role_summary: A Python library that performs codebase analysis to generate technology-agnostic documentation wikis, explicitly designed to support system migration workflows.
extracted_finding: The system serves as a documentation automation engine with a focus on migration readiness. Core domain concepts include technology abstraction, ensuring the generated wiki describes system architecture and functionality independently of the underlying tech stack. Functional responsibilities involve traversing source code structures, extracting relevant system semantics, and synthesizing a standardized wiki output. The artifact indicates reliance on external specification documents (`VISION.md` and `.spec/`) to define the detailed requirements and operational scope of the library.
